lines.speaker: Urbi
lines.text: Hello there; are you interested in any of my fine daggers? Ideal for slipping under desert robes to give your enemies a nasty surprise...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd rather help you in return for better prices.

lines.speaker: Urbi
lines.text: I think it will take months for me to return to normal business. If you can wait that long, however, I may have tasks for you.
